channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Supreme Court expands presidential firing authority while imposing some restrictions
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled Monday that presidents have broad power to dismiss senior officials over policy disagreements, though certain limits remain.

item.title: California Races to Strip Powers From an Office a Conservative Might Win
item.description: State superintendent will no longer manage California schools under a deal cut between Newsom and the Legislature.

item.title: Supreme Court to Weigh Arizona's Proof of Citizenship for Voter Registration
item.description: The Supreme Court agreed Monday to hear a major election dispute next term on whether Arizona can require proof of citizenship when registering...

item.title: International Judges Cannot Claim Rights They Don't Have
item.description: The law is clear: constitutional rights do not apply to foreign nationals abroad.
